testcase.name: test_data_manager_store_and_metadata_cycle

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ({'data_type': 'test', 'end_date': '2024-01-31', 'start_date': '2024-01-01', 'symbol': 'X'} and None == 'X_test') + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x00000286AD159400>('key') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x00000286AD159400> = {'data_type': 'test', 'end_date': '2024-01-31', 'start_date': '2024-01-01', 'symbol': 'X'}.get

testcase.failure: tests\unit\data\core\test_data_manager_smoke.py:27: in test_data_manager_store_and_metadata_cycle assert meta and meta.get("key") == key E AssertionError: assert ({'data_type': 'test', 'end_date': '2024-01-31', 'start_date': '2024-01-01', 'symbol': 'X'} and None == 'X_test') E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x00000286AD159400>('key') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x00000286AD159400> = {'data_type': 'test', 'end_date': '2024-01-31', 'start_date': '2024-01-01', 'symbol': 'X'}.get
